macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: U.S. Stock Futures Point to Volatile Monday Amid US-Iran Tensions and AI Concerns
items.summary: S&P 500 futures fell 0.43%, Dow futures dropped 1.05%, and Nasdaq futures declined 0.92% in pre-market trading as geopolitical risks and artificial intelligence sector worries weigh on markets. On Friday, major indices closed lower with the S&P 500 falling 29.98 points to 6,878.88, the Dow dropping 521.28 to 48,977.92, and the Nasdaq sinking 210.17 to 22,668.21.

items.title: Nvidia Shares Decline Amid AI Disruption Fears
items.summary: Nvidia stock fell 4.2% on Friday to close at $177.80 in pre-market trading, marking its worst loss since spring despite beating profit expectations. Wall Street is punishing companies perceived as potential losers in the AI revolution, with concerns about whether massive chip spending can sustain growth.

items.title: Oil Prices Rise on Middle East Conflict Concerns
items.summary: Brent crude climbed 2.4% to $72.48 per barrel as analysts warn that escalating Middle East conflict could disrupt global oil supplies and drive prices higher.

items.title: U.S. PPI Data Comes in Hotter Than Expected
items.summary: Friday's Producer Price Index showed a month-on-month increase of 0.5% versus the expected 0.3%, sending stock markets lower and signaling a more hawkish outlook for Federal Reserve rate cuts in 2026.

items.title: Fed Rate Cut Expectations Reduced to Two Cuts for 2026
items.summary: Markets have revised expectations downward, now pricing in only two 0.25% rate cuts for 2026 instead of three, following the stronger-than-expected PPI data.

items.title: Indian Markets Decline Amid Global Headwinds
items.summary: The Nifty 50 fell 1.25% on February 27 amid weak global cues and rising geopolitical risks, with the index approaching key support levels at 25,000 and 24,850.

items.title: Week Ahead: Manufacturing ISM, Services ISM, and Eurozone CPI Data
items.summary: February Manufacturing ISM is due Monday with expectations for a slowdown to 51.5 from 52.6, while Services ISM is expected Wednesday at 53.5 versus 53.8. Eurozone February CPI is also due Wednesday, expected to remain stable at 1.7% headline and 2.2% core year-over-year.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: KAIST Researchers Develop Brain-Inspired AI Model Improving Learning Stability
items.summary: Researchers at KAIST have created a brain-inspired AI model that enhances learning stability. The development was announced on March 2, 2026.

items.title: EY Announces 'Infinite AI' Sponsorship at MWC Barcelona 2026
items.summary: EY is the headline sponsor for 'Infinite AI' at Four Years From Now (4YFN) during MWC Barcelona 2026 (March 2–5), featuring panels on AI's future impact. They highlight AI-driven opportunities for tech companies in 2026.

items.title: Journal Highlights ChatGPT 5 and Google Gemini Advanced for AI Data Analysis in Finance
items.summary: A Journal of Accountancy article discusses ChatGPT 5's capabilities in analyzing datasets, recognizing patterns, and generating visuals, alongside Google Gemini Advanced, for finance professionals.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Honor Unveils Robot Phone with 200MP Camera and Gimbal at MWC 2026
items.summary: Honor announced the Robot Phone featuring a 200-megapixel primary camera with three-axis gimbal stabilization and AI Object Tracking, set for launch later this year. The company also introduced a humanoid Honor Robot capable of backflips for industrial and domestic use.

items.title: Leica Partners with Xiaomi for Leitzphone at MWC 2026
items.summary: Leica revealed a new Leitzphone in collaboration with Xiaomi, resembling the Xiaomi 17 Ultra but distinct, showcased ahead of MWC's official start on March 2.

items.title: Huawei to Showcase Agentic Communication Network Capabilities at MWC 2026
items.summary: Huawei will unveil three key features of its Agentic Communication Network (ACN)—digital identity management, dynamic group communication, and collaboration task session management—to support multi-agent collaboration in the mobile era.
